title: Export-Import & International Trade
shortDescription: GST zero-rated export advisory, LUT procedures, GST refund filing, DGFT compliance, and FEMA cross-border remittance auditing.
fullDescription: Exporters and importers operate in an environment subject to international trade compliance, foreign exchange regulations under FEMA, Customs Act procedures, and GST zero-rated supply rules. Anil Puneet and Associates delivers targeted tax, duty drawdown, GST refund, and regulatory compliance services for international trading companies.
keyChallenges: Filing and tracking GST export refunds (Form GST RFD-01) under LUT without tax payment
FEMA compliance for export proceeds realization within statutory time limits (EDPMS reconciliation)
Import duty drawback calculation, RodTEP incentive accounting, and DGFT license tracking
Form 15CA/15CB certification for import payments and foreign service vendor remittances
tailoredSolutions: End-to-end management of Letter of Undertaking (LUT) filings and GST export refund claims
EDPMS and IDPMS portal entry matching with bank realization certificates (BRC / e-BRC)
Form 15CA/15CB issuance for cross-border software, royalty, and technical service payments
Transfer pricing documentation and arm's length transaction verification for foreign affiliates

caseStudy.title: Export GST Refund Sanction & EDPMS Reconciliation for Textile Exporter
caseStudy.context: A merchant exporter faced delayed GST zero-rated refund claims amounting to ₹45 Lakhs due to invoice mismatch between ICEGATE customs data and GST portal returns.
caseStudy.approach: Anil Puneet and Associates performed line-by-line shipping bill matching, corrected GSTR-1 Table 6A filings, and coordinated with GST officers and AD banks.
caseStudy.outcome: Secured full sanction of ₹45 Lakhs export refund and cleared all pending EDPMS shipping bill entries.
